payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel, visible vertical wood grain and a semi-gloss finish; no handle is visible and the top-right is slightly edge-cropped; approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.
